zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期偏弱整理
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格位于 $2365.29$，较 24 小时前略有下跌 $0.33\%$，显示市场短期承压。价格低点与最新价接近，表明多空双方在此水平存在暂时平衡，但整体缺乏明显上行动能。短线趋势呈弱整理格局，投资者需关注价格能否有效突破支撑或阻力。  

从技术指标来看，SMA(20) 位于 $2374.01$，高于当前价格，暗示价格短期偏弱，可能面临下方支撑测试。MACD 当前为 $0.6769$，虽为正值但未提供信号线参考，显示上涨动能有限，市场仍处于观望阶段。RSI 数据缺失，需要结合价格波动和成交量判断超买超卖情况。  

支撑位方面，短期关键水平在 $2360-2365$ 区间，如跌破可能引发进一步回调。阻力位集中在 $2374-2380$，若价格突破该区间，则有望重新测试 $2400$ 附近心理关口。价格区间震荡特征明显，需关注每日高低点突破情况，以判断趋势方向。  

交易策略上，短线可偏向观望或轻仓逢低做多，止损可设在支撑下方 $10-15$ 美元。若价格突破阻力且伴随成交量放大，可考虑顺势加仓。总体而言，市场暂时缺乏明确方向，投资者需保持纪律，结合关键技术水平制定操作计划。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum (ETH) is currently trading near $2365, reflecting a marginal decline of 0.33% over the past 24 hours. Price action has been relatively narrow, with the daily high at $2373.73 and a low at $2365.29, indicating low intraday volatility. The market shows a mild bearish bias as the current price remains slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at $2374.01, suggesting sellers retain modest short-term control, though the trend has yet to solidify decisively.  

The MACD reading at 0.6769 suggests positive momentum, although the absence of the signal line prevents a full crossover interpretation. This indicates that while bullish pressure exists, it may be weakening, and traders should exercise caution. With the RSI unavailable, it is difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions; however, the price hovering just below the SMA indicates a potential short-term consolidation or minor pullback before the next directional move.  

Immediate support is likely around $2360, a level that aligns with the recent intraday low, and could serve as a base for buyers if downward pressure intensifies. Resistance appears at $2374, coinciding with the SMA(20) and the intraday high, marking a potential hurdle for upside attempts. A sustained break above this resistance may open the door toward $2380-$2385, while a decisive drop below support could target $2345 in the short term.  

Traders may consider a cautious approach, favoring long positions on dips near $2360 with tight stop-losses just below support. Conversely, short-term traders could watch for rejections at $2374 to initiate tactical short trades, taking advantage of potential pullbacks. Overall, ETH/USD is exhibiting consolidation with a slight bearish tilt, and clear confirmation through volume and momentum indicators will be crucial before committing to more aggressive positions.
